action.reasoning: Observation: baseline rmse_z500=719.63 (val 725.9) after 3 epochs, small model (~850k params), high train stride=6, loss plateaus quickly. Analysis: sufficient for pipeline validation but under-capacity and under-trained (limited data seen, no scheduler). Decision: incrementally scale model (hidden_channels=128, 8 resblocks ~2.5M params), reduce train stride to 4 (more data), increase to 15 epochs with CosineAnnealingLR (lr=5e-4), set val stride=1 for better monitoring; this should drive lower RMSE while keeping iter time ~30-60s.
